# Support

Planwright is early-stage software.
- [Public Support](#public-support)
- [Security Reports](#security-reports)
- [Support Boundary](#support-boundary)

# Public Support

Use public issues for:
- reproducible bugs
- documentation corrections
- clearly scoped feature requests

# Security Reports

Use security reporting paths in [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for vulnerabilities.

# Support Boundary

There is no guaranteed response time, service-level agreement or production support commitment.
